cover.title: Multi-Diagram Showcase
cover.subtitle: A copy-pasteable sample showing independent diagram slots combined with standard sheets, tables, and callouts.

sheet.label: DEMO · OVERVIEW
sheet.title: Working with Diagram Elements
sheet.p: This document contains two separate diagram tags. You can upload different images to each slot in the live editor preview, and they will render independently inside the document flow.
Below is a diagram slot mapping components, vectors, and server connections.

diagram.caption: Figure 1: Client-Server Vector Matching System Architecture

sheet.callout: Click directly inside the placeholder above to upload an architecture image. When you export to HTML, the image data is embedded directly into the file as a base64 string, so the file remains self-contained.

sheet.label: DEMO · DATAFLOW
sheet.title: Data Handling Flowchart
sheet.p: You can define another diagram tag with a different id attribute. Uploading an image to this second slot will not overwrite or conflict with the first diagram.
Below is the data pipeline and retrieval matching logic flowchart.

diagram.caption: Figure 2: Grounding and Response Verification Pipeline

row.cell: Crawler pulls static text blocks from target websites
Embedder vectors chunks and stores them in Postgres
User questions are vector matched in real-time
